title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay
description: Mutable session blobs overwrite history, checkpoints split state from effects, resume repeats a tool call, and a debugging replay contacts production services. Learners cumulatively produce append-only replayable agent session through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define tenant, user, session, invocation, interaction, turn, attempt, call, effect, checkpoint, and parent identities and their lifetimes.
Record typed immutable state transitions with sequence, schema, causation, correlation, redaction, and integrity evidence.
Commit state, pending calls, completed effects, budgets, approvals, and provider references atomically with version checks.
